sections.paragraph:
verb לריב

to quarrel, fight, wrangle; dispute

verb לרבות (>>לִרְבּוֹת)

to increase, multiply, become great

verb להתרבות

to increase, multiply; be pluralized (gram.)

verb להרבות

to increase, multiply; enlarge; do much, do often

verb הורבה

be increased, multiplied; enlarged

masculine noun

Rabbi

adjective

many, much, great, numerous, multiple, generous, infinite, manifold, extreme, mortal, multifarious, multitudinous, plentiful; strong; multi-, poly-

adverb

enough, sufficiently

Rav- (in army rank) , master-, major-, chief-; minister, officer

masculine noun

master, lord; teacher; great scholar (ancient)
